requirement_topic.en: UCC Type Approval — Radio and Telecommunications Terminal Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: UCC型式批准——无线电及电信终端设备
requirement_topic.zht: UCC型式批准——無線電及電信終端設備

summary.en: All radio transmitters and telecommunications terminal equipment must obtain a UCC type approval certificate from the Uganda Communications Commission before importation or sale in Uganda, under the Communications Act 2013. The UCC type approval process requires submission of an application, test reports from an accredited laboratory, and a technical file. A UCC type approval certificate and the UCC approval label with approval number must be displayed on the product and its packaging before customs clearance or sale. CE marking, FCC authorisation, and CCC certification are not recognised as equivalents by UCC. EAC harmonised type approval is under development and may eventually permit multi-market approval covering Uganda, Kenya, Tanzania, Rwanda, Burundi, and DRC, but this does not currently waive the UCC national type approval requirement.
summary.zh: 所有无线电发射机及电信终端设备须依据《通信法》2013年，在进口或于乌干达销售前取得乌干达通信委员会（UCC）颁发的型式批准证书。UCC型式批准程序要求提交申请书、来自认可实验室的测试报告及技术档案。产品及包装在海关清关或销售前须显示UCC型式批准证书及含批准编号的UCC批准标签。CE标志、FCC授权和CCC认证均不被UCC视为等同认可。东非共同体协调型式批准正在发展中，未来可能覆盖乌干达、肯尼亚、坦桑尼亚、卢旺达、布隆迪和刚果民主共和国的多市场批准，但目前尚不免除UCC国家型式批准要求。
summary.zht: 所有無線電發射機及電信終端設備須依據《通訊法》2013年，在進口或於烏干達銷售前取得烏干達通訊委員會（UCC）頒發的型式批准證書。UCC型式批准程序要求提交申請書、來自認可實驗室的測試報告及技術檔案。產品及包裝在海關清關或銷售前須顯示UCC型式批准證書及含批准編號的UCC批准標籤。CE標誌、FCC授權和CCC認證均不被UCC視為等同認可。東非共同體協調型式批准正在發展中，未來可能覆蓋烏干達、肯尼亞、坦尚尼亞、盧旺達、蒲隆地和剛果民主共和國的多市場批准，但目前尚不免除UCC國家型式批准要求。

standards_or_laws: UCC Type Approval Guidelines (Uganda Communications Commission)

summary.en: China MIIT SRRC radio type approval for radio frequency equipment; MIIT network access licence (NAL) for telecommunications terminal equipment; CCC certification for RF equipment within CCC scope. GB standards (e.g. GB 9254, GB 17625 for EMC; GB 4943 for safety) apply domestically. SRRC, NAL, and CCC approvals are China-domestic only and carry no legal standing with the Uganda Communications Commission.
summary.zh: 中国工信部SRRC无线电型式批准适用于射频设备；工信部电信终端设备进网许可证（NAL）适用于电信终端设备；CCC认证适用于CCC范围内的射频设备。GB标准（如GB 9254、GB 17625电磁兼容；GB 4943安全）在境内适用。SRRC、NAL和CCC批准仅限于中国境内，在乌干达通信委员会（UCC）不具法律效力。
summary.zht: 中國工信部SRRC無線電型式批准適用於射頻設備；工信部電信終端設備進網許可證（NAL）適用於電信終端設備；CCC認證適用於CCC範圍內的射頻設備。GB標準（如GB 9254、GB 17625電磁相容；GB 4943安全）在境內適用。SRRC、NAL和CCC批准僅限於中國境內，在烏干達通訊委員會（UCC）不具法律效力。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) — Telecommunications Terminal Equipment (China)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — RF equipment in scope (China)

gap.en: Mandatory separate UCC type approval certificate required from the Uganda Communications Commission under the Communications Act 2013. CE, FCC, and CCC approvals are not accepted. SRRC and NAL have no legal standing in Uganda. EAC harmonisation does not yet remove the UCC national type approval requirement for wireless devices. The UCC approval label with approval number must be displayed on the product and packaging before customs clearance and sale.
gap.zh: 须依据《通信法》2013年另行取得乌干达通信委员会（UCC）颁发的强制性型式批准证书。CE、FCC和CCC批准不被接受。SRRC和NAL在乌干达不具法律效力。东非共同体协调尚未取消无线设备的UCC国家型式批准要求。产品及包装在海关清关和销售前须显示含批准编号的UCC批准标签。
gap.zht: 須依據《通訊法》2013年另行取得烏干達通訊委員會（UCC）頒發的強制性型式批准證書。CE、FCC和CCC批准不被接受。SRRC和NAL在烏干達不具法律效力。東非共同體協調尚未取消無線設備的UCC國家型式批准要求。產品及包裝在海關清關和銷售前須顯示含批准編號的UCC批准標籤。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UCC type approval is mandatory for all radio and telecommunications terminal equipment imported or sold in Uganda under the Communications Act 2013. Chinese SRRC, NAL, and CCC approvals are not recognised by UCC. CE and FCC authorisations are likewise not accepted. A separate UCC type approval process must be completed and the UCC approval label with approval number displayed on the product and packaging before customs clearance and sale. EAC harmonisation does not currently waive this national requirement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据《通信法》2013年，UCC型式批准对于所有在乌干达进口或销售的无线电及电信终端设备均属强制要求。中国SRRC、NAL和CCC批准不被UCC承认，CE和FCC授权同样不被接受。须完成独立的UCC型式批准程序，并在海关清关和销售前于产品及包装上显示含批准编号的UCC批准标签。东非共同体协调目前不免除该国家要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據《通訊法》2013年，UCC型式批准對於所有在烏干達進口或銷售的無線電及電信終端設備均屬強制要求。中國SRRC、NAL和CCC批准不被UCC承認，CE和FCC授權同樣不被接受。須完成獨立的UCC型式批准程序，並在海關清關和銷售前於產品及包裝上顯示含批准編號的UCC批准標籤。東非共同體協調目前不免除該國家要求。
